_description: D100 table for Step 4: Enemy Activity. Roll for a randomly selected Tactical Enemy each turn.
_notes: If you won a battle against the selected enemy last turn, they do NOT carry out an activity (unless they are the Converted). Spending 1 Story Point can skip this step entirely.

entries.name: Patrol
entries.description: The enemy is sending out patrols near their controlled zones. Normally this is not something you have to worry about but, if you wish, you may choose to play a Strike Mission this turn to track down an enemy Leader and gain 1 Enemy Information.

entries.name: Relocate
entries.description: The enemy is shifting their deployments. Randomly pick an enemy-occupied sector. They move to a random adjacent unoccupied sector. If the selected sector is your colony, they launch a Raid instead and move in the opposite direction.

entries.name: Occupy
entries.description: The enemy expands into a random adjacent sector. If this would be your colony, treat this as a Raid instead. If this would be a sector occupied by another enemy, randomly determine who gains control.

entries.name: Rapid Expansion
entries.description: As Occupy, but two adjacent sectors are occupied.

entries.name: Attack
entries.description: The enemy launches an attack on you. Play the Pitched Battle mission this campaign turn. If you lose, you take damage as per Raid.

entries.name: Raid
entries.description: The enemy launches a sneak attack on your colony. You suffer Colony Damage equal to the number of map sectors this enemy occupies +1. If you have Colony Defenses, roll D6s equal to the number of defenses; every die rolling 4+ negates a point of damage.
